  fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://bw.health.gov/fhir/ConceptMap/whonet-antibiotic-to-loinc"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://bw.health.gov/fhir/ConceptMap/whonet-antibiotic-to-loinc>
  ] ; # 
  fhir:version [ fhir:v "0.1.0"] ; # 
  fhir:name [ fhir:v "WHONETAntibioticToLOINC"] ; # 
  fhir:title [ fhir:v "WHONET Antibiotic Codes to LOINC Susceptibility Codes"] ; # 
  fhir:status [ fhir:v "draft"] ; # 
  fhir:date [ fhir:v "2026-03-13T21:27:21-04:00"^^xsd:dateTime] ; # 
  fhir:publisher [ fhir:v "University of Botswana Partnership"] ; # 
  fhir:contact ( [
fhir:name [ fhir:v "University of Botswana Partnership" ] ;
    ( fhir:telecom [
fhir:system [ fhir:v "url" ] ;
fhir:value [ fhir:v "https://github.com/Dokotela/bw-amr-ig" ]     ] )
  ] ) ; # 
  fhir:description [ fhir:v "Maps WHONET antibiotic codes to LOINC susceptibility test codes. Derived from the AMR R package (https://github.com/msberends/AMR). Contains 271 WHONET antibiotic codes with LOINC mappings. Note: equivalence is 'relatedto' because one WHONET antibiotic code maps to multiple LOINC codes representing different test methods (MIC, disk diffusion, etc.)."] ; # 
  fhir:source [
a fhir:Uri ;
fhir:v "http://whonet.org/CodeSystem/antibiotic"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://whonet.org/CodeSystem/antibiotic>
  ] ; # 
  fhir:target [
a fhir:Uri ;
fhir:v "http://loinc.org/vs"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <http://loinc.org/vs>
  ] ; #

fhir:l <http://loinc.org>     ] ;
